name: eclipse-maven-view
description: A plug-in that recreates IntelliJ IDEA's Maven View for Eclipse.

name: eclipse-iconpreview
description: Lightweight plugin to preview image files in the Eclipse Package Explorer.

name: eclipse-openexplorer
description: Open the selected resource in the system file explorer.

name: eclipse-copyright
description: Copyright header generator for Eclipse (forked from Eclipse-Copyright-Generator).

name: eclipse-multicursor
description: Multiple cursor support for the Eclipse IDE.

name: eclipse-renesas-config-editor
description: Registers Renesas project files (.mtpj / .scfg / .ewp) with Eclipse's XML editor.

name: eclipse-fullscreen
description: Make Eclipse go fullscreen to save screen space.

name: eclipse-autofill-arguments
description: Guess call parameters by the callee parameter names.

name: eclipse-generateAllSetter
description: Generate calls to every setter of a class in one action.

name: eclipse-method-sorter
description: Sort Java class methods to improve source code readability.

name: eclipse-fixcnchar
description: Automatically replace full-width Chinese punctuation with half-width punctuation while coding.

name: eclipse-minimap
description: Minimap for navigating source code in Eclipse.

name: eclipse-bpep
description: Builder Pattern Eclipse Plugin — generate fluent builders from Java classes.

name: eclipse-folding
description: Enhanced code folding in the Eclipse IDE.

name: eclipse-instasearch
description: Quick workspace search with instant results powered by a Lucene index.
